contracts.name: AppOwnsBusinessSemantics
contracts.rule: Business semantics must stay in app/sdk; adapter must remain generic.

contracts.name: KernelConsumesGenericIROnly
contracts.rule: Kernel consumes generic IR/instructions only, never business config text.

contracts.name: ContractConflictPriorityFiveTier
contracts.rule: Conflict resolution: architecture > integration > style > functional > configuration (supersedes day16 C-IX-6 four-tier chain).
contracts.deprecate: Replaces four-tier C-IX-6 wording for day17+; day16 historical text retained in record.
